title: Tool: get_company (one-hop neighborhood)
userStory: As the agent, I want a get_company tool so that draft_outreach has full context on a target.
acceptanceCriteria: Calls Graphiti get_node for a Company entity by name; traverses one hop
Returns related people, applications, outreach, and notes
Verify: get_company('Acme') returns expected related entities from the migrated graph
